# Repository Instructions for GitHub Copilot

This repository contains reusable AI-agent skills. When a request involves generating Chinese HTML notes, review pages, reading pages, meeting pages, or literature-review pages from one or more arXiv papers, use the local `arxiv-paper-html-notes` workflow.

Read the task-specific instruction file first:

- `.github/instructions/arxiv-paper-html-notes.instructions.md`

Then load the canonical skill package as needed:

- `arxiv-paper-html-notes/SKILL.md`
- `arxiv-paper-html-notes/references/content_schema.md`
- `arxiv-paper-html-notes/references/visual_style.md`
- `arxiv-paper-html-notes/references/paper_analysis_checklist.md`
